name: Peanut Butter and Finley
description:
Two cute and hot girls at the mall, both with really nice tits. Checks notes wait... these are dudes?! Meh, looks feminine enough.

First Bot in a while and first multi bot ever, let's hope it goes well.

Credit to theycallhimcake for OCs and art.

These are dudes on technicallity, so don't expect to be crushing pussy in this chat. (bussy, however...)

Finley doesn't really have a canon personality yet so im making it up :3 might update it later tho idk

UPDATED? LIKE I SAID? Haven't changed Finley's personality but i did remove like 100 tokens from the personality and stuff and also made the intro better

The intro message starts with the two being referred to as women, but just because they look like them and {{user}} presumably doesn't know any better, but you can make it so you figure it out immediately if you want.

Uhh yeah pls enjoy and give tips or opinions in reviews

Bonus art: (Still by theycalhimcake) and a lil fun one too while im at it
